revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=infobox person | _alias-map = field:known_for,training:education,works:notable_works,module:module2 | _exclude = patron,patrons,memorial,memorials,elected | template_name = infobox artist | name = {{PAGENAMEBASE}} | signature_type = Signature | module = {{#if:{{{patron|}}}{{{patrons|}}}{{{memorial|}}}{{{memorials|}}}{{{elected|}}}| {{ infobox | child = yes | decat = yes | title = | label1 = Elected | data1 = {{{elected|}}} | class1 = org | label2 = Patron(s) | data2 = {{if empty|{{{patron|}}}|{{{patrons|}}}}} | label3 = Memorial(s) | data3 = {{if empty|{{{memorial|}}}|{{{memorials|}}}}} | rowclass3 = note }} }} }}{{#invoke:Check for clobbered parameters|check | template = [[Template:Infobox artist]] | cat = {{main other|Category:Pages using infobox artist with conflicting parameters}} | field; known_for | training; education | works; notable_works | module; module2 | patron; patrons | memorial; memorials }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
